parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: While , the mouse movement will be output from and the will cook every frame. When set to it will not cook and the current mouse X or Y values will not be output. will capture mouse events only when t

parameters.name: output
parameters.label: Output Coordinates
parameters.description: Controls the range of the mouse Position X and Position Y.

parameters.name: posxname
parameters.label: Position X
parameters.description: The name of the channel that returns the horizontal movement of the mouse.

parameters.name: posyname
parameters.label: Position Y
parameters.description: The name of the channel that returns the vertical movement of the mouse.

parameters.name: lbuttonname
parameters.label: Left Button
parameters.description: The name of the channel that returns the state of the left button.

parameters.name: rbuttonname
parameters.label: Right Button
parameters.description: The name of the channel that returns the state of the right button.

parameters.name: mbuttonname
parameters.label: Middle Button
parameters.description: The name of the channel that returns the state of the middle button.

parameters.name: wheel
parameters.label: Wheel
parameters.description: This channel goes up when the wheel is rolled away from the user and goes down when it is rolled the other way.

parameters.name: wheelinc
parameters.label: Wheel Increment
parameters.description: The amount that is added or subtracted to the current value of the Wheel channel when the wheel is moved.

parameters.name: monitor
parameters.label: Monitor
parameters.description: This channel returns which monitor the mouse cursor is currently on.

parameters.name: panels
parameters.label: Panels
parameters.description: Events are only triggered when the specified panel has focus.

parameters.name: rate
parameters.label: Sample Rate
parameters.description: The sample rate of the channels, in samples per second.

parameters.name: left
parameters.label: Extend Left
parameters.description: The left extend conditions (before/after range).

parameters.name: right
parameters.label: Extend Right
parameters.description: The right extend conditions (before/after range).

parameters.name: defval
parameters.label: Default Value
parameters.description: The value used for the Default Value extend condition.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page.

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).
